untranslatable_reason: Measured Move Up requires multi-leg analysis with specific leg identification (point A, B, C across multiple bars), precise height measurement from first leg, and target calculation based on corrective phase low. Current indicators lack multi-leg state tracking and absolute price target calculation capability. Pattern requires: (1) identifying first leg high/low across variable bar range, (2) measuring exact decline distance, (3) calculating target = leg_height + corrective_low. This exceeds point-in-time indicator capabilities without custom state variables.
